allow: PowerShell(foreach \($r in @\("16-96/metro.istanbul","ardytstrn/metro.istanbul"\)\) { Write-Output "=== $r ==="; try { $info = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/$r" -Headers @{ "User-Agent"="cc" }; Write-Output \("full_name: " + $info.full_name + " | desc: " + $info.description + " | default_branch: " + $info.default_branch + " | stars: " + $info.stargazers_count\) } catch { Write-Output \("ERR: " + $_.Exception.Message\) } })

Bash(curl -s -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0 Safari/537.36' --max-time 25 https://api.ibb.gov.tr/MetroIstanbul/api/MetroMobile/V2/GetTimeTable?lineId=1 -w '\\nHTTP:%{http_code}\\n')

Bash(curl -s -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0 Safari/537.36' --max-time 25 -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{}' https://api.ibb.gov.tr/MetroIstanbul/api/MetroMobile/V2/GetTimeTable -w '\\nHTTP:%{http_code}\\n')

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=istanbul+metro+geojson&per_page=15" -Headers @{ "User-Agent" = "research" }; $r.items | Select-Object full_name, stargazers_count, html_url, description | Format-List)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=istanbul+rayli+sistem&per_page=15" -Headers @{ "User-Agent" = "research" }; $r.items | Select-Object full_name, stargazers_count, html_url, description | Format-List)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=istanbul+metro+geojson&per_page=10" -Headers @{ "User-Agent" = "research" } -ErrorAction Stop; "COUNT: $\($r.total_count\)"; $r.items | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.full_name\) | stars=$\($_.stargazers_count\) | $\($_.html_url\)" } } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(foreach \($q in @\("istanbul+metro+in:name,description", "istanbul+transit+geojson", "marmaray", "istanbul+ulasim"\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=$q&per_page=8&sort=stars" -Headers @{ "User-Agent" = "research" } -ErrorAction Stop; "=== QUERY: $q \(total=$\($r.total_count\)\) ==="; $r.items | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.full_name\) | stars=$\($_.stargazers_count\) | $\($_.description\)" } } catch { "ERR $q : $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; "" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/Hero4mohamed/Metro-Istanbul-General-City-Map/git/trees/main?recursive=1" -Headers @{ "User-Agent" = "research" } -ErrorAction Stop; $r.tree | Where-Object { $_.path -match '\\.\(geojson|json|csv|js\)$' } | ForEach-Object { $_.path } } catch { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/Hero4mohamed/Metro-Istanbul-General-City-Map/git/trees/master?recursive=1" -Headers @{ "User-Agent" = "research" }; $r.tree | Where-Object { $_.path -match '\\.\(geojson|json|csv|js\)$' } | ForEach-Object { $_.path } } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Hero4mohamed/Metro-Istanbul-General-City-Map/main/transit_data/lines.json" -Headers @{ "User-Agent" = "research" } -ErrorAction Stop; "TYPE: $\($r.GetType\(\).Name\)"; if \($r.type\) { "GeoJSON type: $\($r.type\)"; "Features: $\($r.features.Count\)"; $r.features[0].properties | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3; "GEOM: $\($r.features[0].geometry.type\)" } else { "Top keys: $\($r.PSObject.Properties.Name -join ', '\)"; \($r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 2\).Substring\(0,1500\) } } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Hero4mohamed/Metro-Istanbul-General-City-Map/main/transit_data/lines.json" -Headers @{ "User-Agent" = "research" }; "Count: $\($r.Count\)"; "First element keys: $\($r[0].PSObject.Properties.Name -join ', '\)"; "---"; $r[0] | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4 | ForEach-Object { if \($_.Length -gt 2000\) { $_.Substring\(0,2000\) } else { $_ } })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Hero4mohamed/Metro-Istanbul-General-City-Map/main/transit_data/lines.json" -Headers @{ "User-Agent" = "research" }; "Refs present: $\(\(\($r | ForEach-Object { $_.ref }\) -join ', '\)\)"; "---"; "Sample station object \(M11\):"; $r[0].stations[0] | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3; "Station count M11: $\($r[0].stations.Count\)"; "---kinds---"; $r | Group-Object kind | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\): $\($_.Count\)" })

Bash(curl -s -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0 Safari/537.36' --max-time 40 'https://transit.land/api/v2/rest/feeds?bbox=28.5,40.8,29.5,41.3&limit=50' -o /tmp/tl.json -w 'HTTP:%{http_code} size:%{size_download}\\n')

Bash(curl -s -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0 Safari/537.36' --max-time 40 https://mobilitydatabase.org/api/feeds/search?q=istanbul -o /tmp/md.json -w 'HTTP:%{http_code} size:%{size_download}\\n')

Bash(curl -s -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0 Safari/537.36' --max-time 40 https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CxAalto/gtfs_data_pipeline/master/gtfs-sources.yaml -o /tmp/cx.yaml -w 'HTTP:%{http_code} size:%{size_download}\\n')

Bash(curl -s -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0 Safari/537.36' --max-time 40 'https://api.mobilitydatabase.org/v1/gtfs_feeds?country_code=TR&limit=100' -o /tmp/m1.json -w 'HTTP:%{http_code} size:%{size_download}\\n')

Bash(curl -s -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0 Safari/537.36' --max-time 40 'https://api.mobilitydatabase.org/v1/gtfs_rt_feeds?country_code=TR&limit=100' -o /tmp/m2.json -w 'HTTP:%{http_code} size:%{size_download}\\n')

Bash(curl -s -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0 Safari/537.36' --max-time 30 https://api.ibb.gov.tr/iett/FiloDurum/SeferGerceklesme.asmx?wsdl -o /tmp/wsdl.xml -w 'HTTP:%{http_code} size:%{size_download}\\n')

Bash(python -c "import sys,re; h=sys.stdin.read\(\); print\('len',len\(h\)\); [print\(m\) for m in re.findall\(r'/MetroIstanbul/api/[A-Za-z0-9/_{}]+', h\)][:0]; import collections; print\('\\n'.join\(sorted\(set\(re.findall\(r'api/MetroMobile/[A-Za-z0-9/_{}]+', h\)\)\)\)\)")

Bash(curl -s -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0 Safari/537.36' --max-time 35 -X POST -H 'Content-Type: text/xml; charset=utf-8' -H 'SOAPAction: "http://tempuri.org/GetHatOtoKonum_json"' -d @/tmp/soap.xml https://api.ibb.gov.tr/iett/FiloDurum/SeferGerceklesme.asmx -o /tmp/bus.xml -w 'HTTP:%{http_code} size:%{size_download}\\n')
